title: Projects
description: Explore my featured software engineering projects, including infrastructure automation, web applications, and cloud solutions. Each project showcases different aspects of my technical expertise.

projects.title: Infrastructure
projects.description: Helm-based infrastructure-as-a-service running my self-hosted apps on a Raspberry Pi k3s cluster.

projects.title: Portfolio
projects.description: This site — a static, dark-mode-aware Astro build deployed as a Docker container behind Nginx.

projects.title: Ma3ady (ميعادي)
projects.description: Multi-tenant, mobile-first appointment booking app. Spec-driven, bilingual EN/AR.

projects.title: St. Mina Connect
projects.description: Mobile app for the St. Mina Coptic Orthodox Church (Munich) with magic-link auth and a local Supabase dev stack.

projects.title: pile.bio
projects.description: Production link-in-bio platform with Firebase auth, real-time admin previews over Socket.IO, and a draft/publish workflow.

projects.title: Secrets
projects.description: Send-once secret sharing with client-side AES-256-GCM encryption — server stores only ciphertext and hashed tokens. Live at secrets.morcos.tech.

projects.title: Eventlane
projects.description: Real-time event RSVP + waiting list system with optimistic locking and live updates over WebSocket/STOMP.
